name: All That Pingpong
overview: Korea's first full-fledged table tennis entertainment show in which hidden table tennis masters in the entertainment industry are reborn as the strongest table tennis team through special training and challenge.

trailers.title: [티저] 지금까지의 은지원은 잊어라! 벌써부터 강호동 견제하는 '탁구인' 은지원?! #올탁구나! EP.1
